channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: News Article Currently Inaccessible Due to Server Restrictions
item.description: We attempted to access the news article from NDTV regarding school assembly news headlines for March 8, covering top national, world, sports, and business news. However, the server has denied access a...

item.title: Nenu Ready Film Team Engages Students During KL University Cultural Festival
item.description: The team of the upcoming Telugu film 'Nenu Ready', featuring Koneru Havish in the lead role, visited KL University in Vaddeswaram on Saturday as part of their promotional activities. During the event,...

item.title: Ducks Rally to Defeat Canadiens 6-5 in Shootout After Kreider Ties the Game
item.description: In a thrilling NHL matchup, the Anaheim Ducks staged a remarkable comeback to defeat the Montreal Canadiens 6-5 in a shootout. The turning point came when Montreal's Kreider scored a crucial goal to t...

item.title: Ogun Town Planner Killed During Enforcement Operation After Clash With Soldiers
item.description: For one tragic day for Ogun State, one ad-hoc staff member, Oluwaseyi Adeoye, lost him life as soldiers opened fire during a building regulation enforcement at Ganic Company, Orile-Imo along the Sagam...

item.title: South Africa's NHI Implementation Paused Amid Court Challenges
item.description: South Africa's National Health Insurance (NHI), signed into law in May 2024, faces significant delays as multiple court cases challenge its constitutionality and procedural legitimacy. The NHI aims to...

item.title: Rural Democrats Question Party’s ‘Affordability’ Message Ahead of the Midterms
item.description: The article examines growing frustration among rural Democratic candidates and strategists who believe their party’s heavy focus on an abstract “affordability” message is missing the mark with voters ...

item.title: Toronto-area synagogues damaged by gunfire, no injuries reported
item.description: Early Saturday morning, two additional synagogues in the Toronto area were damaged by gunfire, following a similar incident earlier in the week. The targeted institutions were the BAYT synagogue in Th...

item.title: Addressing Child Marriage to Boost Africa’s Economic Potential
item.description: Africa has about 160 million adolescent girls aged 10 to 19, who are key to the continent’s future workforce. Yet, child marriage remains a huge barrier. Around 130 million girls in Africa were marrie...

item.title: Heavy Floods in Nairobi Claim 23 Lives, Authorities Urge Caution
item.description: Nairobi has been hit hard by flash floods following overnight heavy rains, with the death toll now confirmed at 23 people. The National Police Service reported that areas most affected include Mukuru,...

item.title: Pentagon Appoints Gavin Kliger, Former DOGE Staffer with Controversial Online History, as Chief Data Officer to Oversee AI Initiatives
item.description: On March 7, 2026, the Pentagon appointed Gavin Kliger as its new Chief Data Officer, a position that positions him to lead the department's major artificial intelligence projects. Kliger, a computer s...

item.title: Kuwait reduces oil production due to Iran tensions and Strait of Hormuz risks
item.description: Kuwait Petroleum Corporation (KPC), the state-owned oil company, has announced a precautionary reduction in crude oil production and refining operations due to ongoing attacks by Iran and the effectiv...

item.title: IED Explosion in Wana Leaves 2 Policemen Dead and 31 Injured
item.description: In Lower South Waziristan's Wana area, a tragic incident occurred on Saturday when an improvised explosive device (IED) exploded near Rustam Bazaar, killing two policemen and injuring 31 people, inclu...

item.title: Daily Superquiz and Mini Crossword Challenges
item.description: The Age presents its regular Superquiz for Sunday, 8 March, along with a Mini Crossword designed to test readers' knowledge and quick thinking. The Mini Crossword features ten clues across twenty-five...

item.title: Melbourne Wedding Reception Showcases a Bold Black and Color Theme
item.description: In Melbourne, Von and Ryan Bishop hosted a wedding reception that uniquely showcased their contrasting personalities through a striking visual design. The event space was divided into two distinct hal...

item.title: US waiver on Russian oil to India undermines sanctions, Europe urged to strengthen measures
item.description: The article examines the impact of recent US policy changes on sanctions against Russia and their economic consequences. Last week, President Trump allowed India a 30-day waiver to purchase Russian oi...

item.title: Philippine Coast Guard reports financial motives in Chinese-linked espionage cases
item.description: The Philippine Coast Guard (PCG) recently disclosed that the alleged Chinese-linked espionage activities by three Filipinos were motivated purely by financial gain. According to Rear Admiral Roy Vince...

item.title: Thika Mother Bids Farewell to Son After Retrieving Body from Mortuary
item.description: A grieving mother from Kiganjo, Thika, Kiambu county, finally retrieved the body of her Form Three son, Zakayo Analo Jimmy, who died under mysterious circumstances at Gatamaiyu Senior School. The boy'...

item.title: Top Recommended Carry-On Luggage for 2026 Travel
item.description: Whether you're heading out for a weekend getaway or embarking on an international adventure, having high-quality carry-on luggage can make your travels smoother and more enjoyable. Global News' The Cu...

item.title: Ethan Sanders secures Raiders victory over Manly with first NRL field goal
item.description: In a thrilling NRL clash at Brookvale, the Canberra Raiders narrowly defeated the Manly Sea Eagles 29-28 in golden point, thanks to Ethan Sanders' remarkable first-ever NRL field goal. The young halfb...

item.title: Amit Shah inaugurates exhibition on new criminal laws in Haridwar, Uttarakhand
item.description: In Haridwar, Union Home Minister Amit Shah inaugurated a state-level exhibition on 'Nootan Nyaya Sanhita' at Bairagi Camp, organised by the Uttarakhand government. The exhibition aims to create awaren...
